message:
fix: add SSH fallback for federation PushTo/PullFrom/Fetch (bd-zoi2)

Federation methods (PushTo, PullFrom, Fetch) always used SQL
(CALL DOLT_PUSH/PULL/FETCH), which times out for SSH remotes because
the MySQL connection drops before the SSH transfer completes.

Add isPeerSSHRemote() to detect SSH peer URLs and CLI fallback methods
(doltCLIPushToPeer, doltCLIPullFromPeer, doltCLIFetchFromPeer) that
shell out to dolt CLI, matching the pattern already used in store.go
Push/Pull/ForcePush methods.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
